site_surface.label: Ranker System
site_surface.description: Quality-filtered public ranker surface using edge >= 0.03 while excluding prices below -150.

challenger_surface.label: Ranker Challenger
challenger_surface.description: Separate challenger lane using edge >= 0.04 with no additional favorite cap. Not the official public betting record.

internal_research_lanes.label: Canonical Full Research Lane
internal_research_lanes.description: Broader canonical edge >= 0.03 ranker universe retained internally for prove-it research only.

retained_internal_systems.label: Totals / Unders System
retained_internal_systems.description: Retained internally for historical comparison and specialist analysis, but removed from the current public site surface.

promotion_rule: Challenger policy cannot become live without explicit forward evidence, reconciliation, and doc updates.
notes: The public site surface is the capped .03 live policy.
The challenger .04 no-cap policy is tracked separately and must not contaminate the official public record.
